title: Certification of district
doc_html:
§1216.  Certification of district

The state soil conservation committee shall on or before January 1 of such calendar year certify to the State Treasurer or other appropriate official, the number of districts in operation in the state.
doc_text:
§1216.  Certification of district
The state soil conservation committee shall on or before January 1 of such calendar year certify to the State Treasurer or other appropriate official, the number of districts in operation in the state.
